segments.text: Dual Lipa just launched a new brand and everybody thought that it was just another celebrity scam. We've seen this before. A big star launches a brand,
makes quick money and the product is terrible. Usually celebrities go for cheap factories, put their name on generic bottle, sell it to you on a higher price. But she did the opposite
thing. She partnered with the most expensive skincare brand in the world. A brand that sells just one cream for 25,000 rupees. She had the best quality,
but this created a massive problems. Her fans are young. They cannot afford a 25k cream. But still she did not just lower the price to compromise with the

quality. She went to the lab and realized something. That expensive cream, it was for the older skin. They invented a completely new formula specifically for the younger skin. It protects your skin before it gets old.
She is not just selling the face. She's selling entrylevel access to the world's best biotechnology.
